place: Bang Tao Beach, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Beachside 3-Bedroom Home with Rooftop Pool — Bang Tao, Phuket
blurb: A four-storey beachside home moments from the fine sand of Bang Tao Beach — three en-suite bedrooms, sea to the west and mountains to the east, crowned by a private rooftop pool and sun deck, within a gated integrated resort on Phuket's calm north-west coast.
detail:
Set within a private, gated resort community a short walk from Bang Tao Beach, this is one of a small collection of four-storey homes arranged to capture the best of two aspects: the sapphire Andaman Sea to the west and jungle-covered mountains to the east. Vertical living gives each floor its own purpose and its own outlook, with a lift and staircase linking the levels.

Entry is on the first floor, where an open living and entertainment space is paired with a flexible bespoke room that adapts to a media room, study or additional lounge. The second floor is given over to three generous en-suite bedrooms, each framed by full-height windows and served by a walk-in wardrobe. The third floor opens up again as a light-filled living and dining room, with panoramic glazing on both sides drawing the sea and the mountains inside.

The home is crowned by a rooftop that is open to the sky: a private plunge pool and sun deck for lounging, alongside a sheltered deck for alfresco dining as the sun sets over the water. Interiors are finished in warm timber, natural stone and quiet, minimal lines, with a fully fitted kitchen and generous storage integrated throughout.

The residence occupies a plot of approximately 165–215 m² with around 468 m² of built-up area. The building is sold freehold, while the land is offered to foreign buyers on a registered, renewable 30+30+30-year leasehold; quoted pricing reflects standard fixtures and finishes, with a loose-furniture package available separately. Ownership sits within an award-winning integrated resort — moments from a shopping village, signature restaurants, spas and a championship golf course — and carries membership privileges across the resort group's hotels, spas and golf worldwide, alongside 24-hour concierge, on-site management and optional rental services.
